source.title: PDD Holdings SEC EDGAR XBRL - Revenue & Operating Income (20-F filings)

extractions.claim: PDD Holdings FY2024 total revenue was RMB 393.84 billion (US$53.96 billion), per 20-F filed 2025-04-28
extractions.evidence: RevenueFromContractWithCustomerExcludingAssessedTax: CNY 393,840,000,000 for period 2024-01-01 to 2024-12-31 (20-F, filed 2025-04-28). USD equivalent: $53,960,000,000.

verification.verifier_notes: Directly extracted from SEC EDGAR XBRL API. Primary source.

extractions.claim: PDD Holdings FY2024 operating income was RMB 108.42 billion (US$14.85 billion), per 20-F filed 2025-04-28
extractions.evidence: OperatingIncomeLoss: CNY 108,420,000,000 for period 2024-01-01 to 2024-12-31 (20-F, filed 2025-04-28). USD equivalent: $14,850,000,000.

verification.verifier_notes: Directly extracted from SEC EDGAR XBRL API. Primary source.

extractions.claim: PDD Holdings FY2023 total revenue was RMB 247.64 billion (US$34.88 billion)

verification.verifier_notes: Directly extracted from SEC EDGAR XBRL API. Primary source.

extractions.claim: PDD Holdings FY2022 total revenue was RMB 130.56 billion (US$18.93 billion)

verification.verifier_notes: Directly extracted from SEC EDGAR XBRL API. Primary source.

extractions.claim: PDD Holdings FY2025 Q1-Q3 cumulative revenue was approximately RMB 307.93 billion
extractions.evidence: Q1 2025: RMB 95,672.2M + Q2 2025: RMB 103,984.8M + Q3 2025: RMB 108,276.5M = RMB 307,933.5M. Source: quarterly 6-K filings.

verification.verifier_notes: Sum of three reported quarterly figures from investor.pddholdings.com press releases.

extractions.claim: PDD Holdings FY2025 revenue breakdown shows transaction services nearly equal to online marketing in Q3 2025
extractions.evidence: Q3 2025: Online marketing services RMB 53,347.6M (8% YoY growth), Transaction services RMB 54,928.9M (10% YoY growth). Transaction services now slightly exceed marketing revenue.

verification.verifier_notes: From PDD Holdings Q3 2025 earnings release.
